    • clientOrderId

      public NewTrade.Builder clientOrderId(String clientOrderId)
      The unique identifier that is associated with an order. Must be unique by date per trade per client.

      The unique identifier that is associated with an order. Must be unique by date per trade per client.

    • executions

      public NewTrade.Builder executions(List<Execution> executions)
      The executions (sometimes referred to as partial-fills) that comprise the trade.

    • executions

      public NewTrade.Builder executions(Optional<? extends List<Execution>> executions)
      The executions (sometimes referred to as partial-fills) that comprise the trade.

    • fees

      public NewTrade.Builder fees(List<BookingFee> fees)
      Any client calculated fees associated with the trade. Only allowed if trade.open = false. Regulatory fees will be calculated automatically if they are not explicitly overwritten or suppressed.

    • fees

      public NewTrade.Builder fees(Optional<? extends List<BookingFee>> fees)
      Any client calculated fees associated with the trade. Only allowed if trade.open = false. Regulatory fees will be calculated automatically if they are not explicitly overwritten or suppressed.

    • identifier

      public NewTrade.Builder identifier(String identifier)
      Identifier (of the type specified in `identifier_type`). Responses will supply the originally requested identifier.

    • identifier

      public NewTrade.Builder identifier(Optional<String> identifier)
      Identifier (of the type specified in `identifier_type`). Responses will supply the originally requested identifier.

    • identifierType

      public NewTrade.Builder identifierType(Optional<? extends RebookTradeResponseIdentifierType> identifierType)
      Identifier type for the asset being traded.

    • issuingRegionCode

      public NewTrade.Builder issuingRegionCode(String issuingRegionCode)
      Unicode CLDR region code. Issuing Region Code is required for some `identifier_type`s, especially CUSIP.

    • issuingRegionCode

      public NewTrade.Builder issuingRegionCode(Optional<String> issuingRegionCode)
      Unicode CLDR region code. Issuing Region Code is required for some `identifier_type`s, especially CUSIP.

    • name

      public NewTrade.Builder name(String name)
      The resource name of the trade.

    • name

      public NewTrade.Builder name(Optional<String> name)
      The resource name of the trade.

    • open

      public NewTrade.Builder open(boolean open)
      State of this trade's completeness in filling. True: trade is not done filling and can append more executions onto the trade False: trade is done filling and cannot append more executions onto the trade By default, trades are closed when they are created. An open trade can later be closed by calling the CompleteTrade endpoint. Additional executions can be appended to an open trade by calling the CreateExecution endpoint. Trades that are left open will be automatically closed nightly before Ledger's EOD.

    • open

      public NewTrade.Builder open(Optional<Boolean> open)
      State of this trade's completeness in filling. True: trade is not done filling and can append more executions onto the trade False: trade is done filling and cannot append more executions onto the trade By default, trades are closed when they are created. An open trade can later be closed by calling the CompleteTrade endpoint. Additional executions can be appended to an open trade by calling the CreateExecution endpoint. Trades that are left open will be automatically closed nightly before Ledger's EOD.

    • orderId

      public NewTrade.Builder orderId(String orderId)
      Street-level order id, unique by day per broker.

    • orderId

      public NewTrade.Builder orderId(Optional<String> orderId)
      Street-level order id, unique by day per broker.

    • routeType

      public NewTrade.Builder routeType(RebookTradeResponseRouteType routeType)
      Route type for the trade.

    • routeType

      public NewTrade.Builder routeType(Optional<? extends RebookTradeResponseRouteType> routeType)
      Route type for the trade.

    • settlementDate

      public NewTrade.Builder settlementDate(RebookTradeResponseSettlementDate settlementDate)
      Defaults to T+1 for equities if this is not provided. Calculated by the execution's execution_time field in Eastern Time.

    • settlementDate

      public NewTrade.Builder settlementDate(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RebookTradeResponseSettlementDate> settlementDate)
      Defaults to T+1 for equities if this is not provided. Calculated by the execution's execution_time field in Eastern Time.

      public NewTrade.Builder side(RebookTradeResponseSide side)
      Denotes if the trade is a SELL or a BUY.

      The source of the submission.

    • specialInstructions

      public NewTrade.Builder specialInstructions(List<RebookTradeResponseSpecialInstructions> specialInstructions)
      An enumerated list of values used to indicate certain attributes about a trade (E.g. DISCRETION_EXERCISED, BROKER_LIQUIDATION) and/or trigger downstream processing rules (e.g. SUPPRESS_TRACE_REPORTING)

    • specialInstructions

      public NewTrade.Builder specialInstructions(Optional<? extends List<RebookTradeResponseSpecialInstructions>> specialInstructions)
      An enumerated list of values used to indicate certain attributes about a trade (E.g. DISCRETION_EXERCISED, BROKER_LIQUIDATION) and/or trigger downstream processing rules (e.g. SUPPRESS_TRACE_REPORTING)

      public NewTrade.Builder tradeId(String tradeId)
      A ULID to uniquely identify the trade globally.
